title: Context-shed verification evidence for noisy ADV operations

tasks.title: Implement smart truncation in `adv_run_test` with inline TDD: first add failing unit tests in `plugin/src/tools/test.test.ts` proving (a) late failure lines survive noisy failing output, (b) late summary lines survive noisy passing output, (c) output remains bounded near 2000 chars, and (d) `[adv_run_test]` diagnostic prefixes survive truncation. Then add exported pure helper `shapeCommandOutput` in `plugin/src/tools/test.ts`, replace head-only truncation with the helper, preserve exact `... (truncated)` suffix, preserve API/return shape/exitCode semantics, and run focused tests plus repo check.
tasks.verification: Focused tests: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/test.test.ts → 7 passed. Repo check: pnpm run check → typecheck/lint/format:check passed.

proposal.approval_evidence: B/F/S scan: B:C F:P S:C. No CRITICAL, no HIGH ≥ 2. Single MEDIUM (F1) — deliberate underspecification of capsule shape, addressed by discovery agenda item DA3.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. User approved pivot from full context-shed to minimal smart truncation in adv_run_test. Agreement and AC approved: existing API unchanged, ~2000 char budget retained, no new tools/core changes/artifacts.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed and independently validated (VALIDATED). No user-value tradeoff remains after approved pivot. Strategy: pure shapeCommandOutput helper in adv_run_test, exact suffix preservation, no API/tool/schema changes.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep approved by user. Task graph: one inline-TDD implementation task for smart truncation in adv_run_test, focused tests, repo check.
